# Event sheet 1 — DSL Coordinate Index
# Regenerate: npm run generate-dsl
#
# Event | JSON Path             | SID              | DSL Line | Description
#-------|-----------------------|------------------|----------|-----------
  -     | events[0]             | §100000000000020 | 4        | global var score: number = 0
  1     | events[1]             | §100000000000022 | 6        | group "GameLoop"
  -     | events[1].children[0] | §100000000000021 | 7        | var temp: number = 0
